meaning: n.[医]反颌(指下颌或下门齿前突,超出上颌或上门齿)[仿 overbite]
examples: He just looks grumpy because of his underbite, wrinkles, and dark complexion.
The vet said he's as healthy as any other puppy. He just looks grumpy because of his underbite, wrinkles, and dark complexion.
His newest client is Princess Monster Truck, a cat with an underbite.
